document_api_meta.title: Create Update Inbound Plan
document_api_meta.env_desc: Initializes a new inbound plan or updates an existing one by defining goods, or carton configurations and dimensions.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

request_body_param.name: plan_id
request_body_param.desc: Without plan id it is creating, with plan id it is updating.

request_body_param.name: ^carton_type
request_body_param.desc:
Indicates if this is a single SKU carton or multi SKU carton.
**Possible values:**
* `SINGLE_SKU`
* `MULTI_SKU`

request_body_param.name: ^items
request_body_param.desc: Goods item list of a carton.

request_body_param.name: ^^expiration_timestamp
request_body_param.desc: The expiration date for this item, Unix timestamp in seconds.

request_body_param.name: ^^weight_unit
request_body_param.desc:
The unit of measurement used for the weight of the items or cartons in this shipment.

**Possible values:**
* `KILOGRAM` (kg)
* `GRAM` (g)
* `MILLIGRAM` (mg)
* `POUNDS` (lbs)
* `OUNCE` (oz)

request_body_param.name: ^^length_unit
request_body_param.desc:
The unit of measurement used for the dimensions (length, width, height) of the items or cartons in this shipment.

**Possible values:**
* `METER` (m)
* `CENTIMETER` (cm)
* `MILLIMETER` (mm)
* `FOOT` (ft)
* `MICRON` (μm)
* `INCH` (in)

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

error_code_list.msg: Internal error. Please try again. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please contact platform support.
Request or request parameters are empty. Please recheck the input parameters.

sample_code.label: Go
sample_code.value:
// For more details about the SDK, refer to the documentation:
// https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/67c83e0799a75104986ae498
func fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanPost() {
    configuration := apis.NewConfiguration()
    configuration.AddAppInfo(appKey, appSecret)
    apiClient := apis.NewAPIClient(configuration)
    request := apiClient.FbtV202602API.Fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanPost(context.Background())
    request = request.XTtsAccessToken("your access token")
    request = request.ContentType("application/json")
    request = request.ShopCipher("your shop cipher")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBody := fbt_v202602.NewFbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBody()
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBody.SetPlanId("5766071177167344427")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBody.SetIdempotentKey("9ef6857095f84893")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyGoodsItems := fbt_v202602.NewFbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyGoodsItems()
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyGoodsItems.SetGoodsId("231313")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyGoodsItems.SetQuantity(400)
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyGoodsItemsList := []fbt_v202602.Fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyGoodsItems{*fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyGoodsItems}
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBody.SetGoodsItems(fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyGoodsItemsList)
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartons := fbt_v202602.NewFbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartons()
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartons.SetCartonType("SINGLE_SKU")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsItems := fbt_v202602.NewFbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsItems()
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsItems.SetGoodsId("12345")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsItems.SetQuantity(20)
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsItems.SetLotCode("sfsfnjkfvv")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsItems.SetExpirationTimestamp("1623812664")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsItemsList := []fbt_v202602.Fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsItems{*fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsItems}
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartons.SetItems(fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsItemsList)
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartons.SetQuantity(2)
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsCartonNumsList := []string{"C0001","C0002"}
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartons.SetCartonNums(fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsCartonNumsList)
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsBoxMeasurements := fbt_v202602.NewFbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsBoxMeasurements()
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsBoxMeasurements.SetWeight("3.50")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsBoxMeasurements.SetWeightUnit("POUNDS")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsBoxMeasurements.SetWidth("1.2")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsBoxMeasurements.SetHeight("2")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsBoxMeasurements.SetLength("5")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsBoxMeasurements.SetLengthUnit("INCH")
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartons.SetBoxMeasurements(*fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsBoxMeasurements)
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsList := []fbt_v202602.Fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartons{*fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartons}
    fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBody.SetCartons(fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBodyCartonsList)
    request = request.Fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBody(*fbt202602CreateUpdateInboundPlanRequestBody)
    resp, httpResp, err := request.Execute()
    if err != nil || httpResp.StatusCode != 200 {
        fmt.Printf("productsRequest err:%v resbody:%s", err, httpResp.Body)
        return
    }
    if resp == nil {
        fmt.Printf("response is nil")
        return
    }
    if resp.GetCode()!= 0 {
        fmt.Printf("response business is error, errorCode:%d errorMessage:%s", resp.GetCode(), resp.GetMessage())
        return
    }
    respDataJson, _ := json.MarshalIndent(resp.GetData(), "", "  ")
    fmt.Println("response data:", string(respDataJson))
    return
}
